risk_if_not_implemented: Without AI & Autonomous Technologies Human Oversight, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Secure Baseline Configurations
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to develop, document and maintain secure baseline configurations for Technology Assets, Applications and/or Services (TAAS) that are consistent with industry-accepted system hardening standards.
compensating_control_1.justification: Secure Baseline Configurations (CFG-02) provides configuration hardening that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies Human Oversight (AAT-22.1) by eliminating unnecessary services and enforcing secure settings to reduce inherent exposure. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security Impact Analysis for Changes
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to analyze proposed changes for potential security impacts, prior to the implementation of the change.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security Impact Analysis for Changes (CHG-03) provides risk identification and prioritization that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies Human Oversight (AAT-22.1) by enabling informed decisions about where to focus resources to manage residual exposure. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
